questionHtml: Pluto is a dwarf planet of the Sun that orbits at a distance of 5.9 × 109 km from the Sun. Determine, in years, the orbital period of Pluto.
markschemeHtml:
TPluto2=TEarth2rPluto3rEarth3 used ✓ 

Earth orbital radius = 1.5 × 1011 m (from AU) AND uses 1 earth year (in any units) ✓ 

247 years ✓

meta.title: Pluto is a dwarf planet of the Sun that orbits at a distance of 5.9 × 109 km from the Sun. Determine, in years, the orbital period of Pluto.
